## Implementation Deep Dive

<ComparisonTable title="Memory Stores" columns={['Store','Best For','Latency','Persistence','Complexity']} rows={[
  ['In-memory dict','Prototyping, short sessions','Instant','None','Minimal'],
  ['Redis','Fast key-value, entity memory','1-5ms','Optional','Low'],
  ['PostgreSQL+pgvector','Structured + vector search','5-20ms','Durable','Medium'],
  ['Pinecone/Weaviate','Pure vector similarity search','10-50ms','Durable','Low'],
  ['SQLite','Edge/local deployment','1-5ms','Durable','Low'],
]}/>
